fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly converts fractional shares to integers on line 29 by simple truncation (`int()`), which discards remainders. This causes the sum of the apportioned votes to be less than the total when the division is not exact.

spec.expr: sum([int(v) for v in shares__1]) == total

constraints.intent: The sum of integer-cast shares must equal the total amount to be apportioned.

spec.expr: sum([int(v) for v in shares__1]) == total

constraints.intent: After flooring shares to integers, their sum should still equal the total.
The sum of the calculated fractional shares must equal the total before any integer conversion.
If results are floored to integers, their sum must equal the total.
